Get in touch

This form does not send data; you will see a confirmation alert.

© Lab Technician

Lab Technician Landing Page

A minimal single-page landing site for a lab technician. The page is responsive, uses a red/black/white color scheme, includes a hero with title and subtitle, a brief services list, and a contact form that shows an alert on submit (no backend).

Features
- Single HTML page
- Responsive mobile-first layout
- Hero section with title and subtitle
- Services list
- Contact form (name, email, message) that triggers an alert on submit
- Uses only red (#ff0000), black (#000000), and white (#ffffff)

Getting Started
- Open index.html in your browser to view the page.
- Submit the contact form to see a confirmation alert (no network request, no page reload).

Testing
- Requires Node.js
- Install dependencies: npm install
- Run tests: npm test

Project Structure
- index.html: Main page
- styles.css: Styles (responsive, red/black/white palette)
- script.js: Form handling (alert on submit)
- tests/index.test.js: Jest test to verify hero title exists

notes: Open index.html directly in a browser to view the landing page.
Run tests with: npm install && npm test.
